evidence: The paper trains three classifiers (EN, SVM, RF) but applies only T-REx (EN) to human genome data, reporting candidate genes from EN-based sweep probabilities (Table 1). Feature importance visualizations (Figure 4) are created exclusively for the elastic net model: "Model-informed feature maps were generated through a linear combination of the R feature maps, weighing each map by its component's regression coefficient in the trained T-REx (EN) model." T-REx (RF) is evaluated only for predictive accuracy and robustness in simulations; no feature importance is extracted or used for interpretive conclusions.
